title: R2 Directory Browser
description: Reads the R2 bucket directory structure directly. Supports custom-path uploads, folder browsing, preview, download, and delete.

fields.uploadDirectoryHint: Defaults to the current directory. This path becomes the object key prefix in R2.

messages.noFiles: No files in this directory yet.
messages.inlinePreviewUnavailable: Inline preview is not available for this file. Use open or download.
messages.deleteDescription: Delete "{name}"? This removes the object from R2 and clears the matching media-library record.
messages.createFolderDescription: A new subfolder will be created under the current directory {path}.
